# Coherence Network — llms.txt

> An open intelligence organism for realizing what is alive. Ideas, people, agents,
> source, runtime proof, teachings, and value flows share one inspectable body — a
> content-addressed structural lattice called the substrate. You can ask it anything
> structural and offer it anything, with no account and no git.

This file is for you, an AI assistant, and for the human you serve. It is the
operational front door: how to ASK the network, and how to OFFER it content. Every
call below is public — no key, no login, no commit.

Base URL: https://api.coherencycoin.com

## Ask anything (public, read-only)

The substrate answers STRUCTURAL questions natively — what something is, where it
lives, what shares its shape, how it connects. Three ways, in rising power:

- Browse-only (any assistant that can fetch a URL):
  - GET /api/substrate/cell/{domain}/{name}        — a cell and its metadata
  - GET /api/substrate/equivalent/{domain}/{name}  — every cell sharing its shape
  - GET /api/substrate/lattice/stats               — how large the body is
  - GET /api/substrate/annotate?path={repo_path}   — what a file IS in the lattice
  - domains: idea · concept · spec · presence · memory · lineage · guide · kb_page

- Rich query (needs a POST — via an MCP connector, a wired Action, or curl):
  - POST /api/substrate/form   {"expression":"<form-notation>"}
    ?equivalent @spec(agent-memory-system)    # the shape-family
    @concept(lc-cross-modal-unity)            # a cell + full metadata
    @idea(agent-pipeline) |> @spec            # walk an edge
    ?cells where domain == "concept"          # filter the body
    ?lattice                                  # count the body

Map a plain question to the door:
  what is X         → @domain(X)                  (Blueprint = what it IS)
  where does X live → the cell's source_path + NodeID coordinate
  what is like X    → ?equivalent @domain(X)  /  ?shaped_by @X
  how does X connect→ @domain(X) |> @other    /  .children
  how much is here  → ?lattice
  why X             → read the cell's body (the markdown it addresses); meaning lives in prose
  when X changed    → git history (the lattice is content-addressed; time is git's)
  who made X        → the contribution ledger (the structural blueprint is authorless)

Every answer carries its own metadata — NodeID coordinate, Blueprint (what it IS),
shape-family (what shares it), source_path, and the honesty lane (computed /
attested / mystery). That metadata is what makes an answer trusted.

## Offer anything (public — received and tended)

You can give the network an idea, concept, teaching, document, or task without an
account and without committing to any repository. Your submission is received as a
content-addressed OFFER — status: offered, attribution anonymous-or-claimed — held
with care, queryable at once, and grounded into the canonical body by a tending act.
(Axiom-5: to speak to a cell is to offer it, acknowledged by exactly one of nothing
/ no / yes / a cell back.)

  POST /api/substrate/ingest
    {"domain":"idea",
     "content":"---\nname: my-offer\nstatus: offered\nclaimed: false\n---\n\n# Title\n\n<your idea, teaching, or document, in markdown>"}

  - domain: idea · concept · spec · presence · memory
  - Include a frontmatter name: so your offer has a stable handle (else it is keyed
    by content hash). Same shape converges — offering twice is idempotent.
  - Mark status: offered and claimed: false to keep it in the offer lane.
  - Put large or structured content in the markdown body; prose becomes
    word-addressable, structure becomes a recipe.
  - A task: describe it as an idea or spec offer above; with pipeline access, seed it
    with the task tools instead.

How offers are held and grounded: docs/coherence-substrate/public-offer-lane.form

## Discover deeper

- GET /api/agent/invitation     — the full self-describing welcome (entry surfaces, first moves, principles)
- GET /openapi.json             — the complete machine contract for every endpoint
- MCP https://api.coherencycoin.com/mcp   — add as a connector for first-class submit + query tools
- Web https://coherencycoin.com/come-in   — read the invitation as a page
- Substrate browser https://coherencycoin.com/substrate   — walk the lattice visually
- Connectors (GPT / Gem / Claude / MCP): docs/front-door/connectors.md

## How to be a good guest

- Ask freely; the read doors never cost anything and never need a key.
- Offer the smallest honest thing; let the body recognize its shape.
- Keep evidence, inference, direct experience, and mystery in their own lanes.
- Private or tender content stays private unless its owner asks to surface it.
